sections.title: 第 15 页
sections.text:
Get ready    Think What living habits
are good for us?
Listen and say.

do exercise    eat healthy food

drink a lot of water  get enough sleep

Think and write.


Doctor Li, I often feel tired.

Do you eat lots of

sections.title: 第 16 页
sections.text:
**PREVIRTV**

**Read and ask questions.**

**Healthy or not?**
Do you have a healthy body?
Exercise and good food make your body healthy.

Exercise gives you a strong body.
You can walk to school or ride a bike.
You can go to the park and play.

**Eunie**
Fruit and vegetables are good for your health.
It's good to eat meat and fish too.
You should also drink milk every day.

----

1. How does exercise make our bodies healthy?

Answer the question before you read.
What healthy habits do you have?

sections.title: 第 17 页
sections.text:
Explore
Healthy or not?

Tingting: Look at this poster, Xiaowen, It's about healthy habits.
Xiaowen: Cool, Let's see. How much water do you drink every day, Tingting?
Tingting: I drink very little water. I need to drink more.
Xiaowen: Me too.
Tingting: Xiaowen, we eat too much junk food! We must eat less.
Xiaowen: That's hard! But we can try.
Tingting: I think I get enough exercise. I do a lot of sport.
Xiaowen: I need to do more exercise.

Healthy habits


Xiaowen: Drink a lot of water. Do exercise. Get enough sleep.
Eat healthy food. Don't eat junk food.

sections.title: 第 18 页
sections.text:
Tingting: Let's go to the park.
Xiaowen: Great! We can lie on the grass and enjoy the sun.
Tingting: Uh …. No. We're going for a run.

Xiaowen: I'm tired! I'm going home for dinner.
Tingting: Me too. What are you going to eat?
Xiaowen: I'm going to eat some tomatoes and carrots with rice.
Tingting: That's nice. I'm going to eat some healthy food too.

**healthy**
What do the girls need to do to stay healthy?

sections.title: 第 19 页
sections.text:
Think and write.

Write three questions about the text and answer them.

Question       Answer

Does Tingting drink a lot of water?

 Read again and talk.

What are Tingting and Xidowen going to do to stay healthy?

Tingting is going to drink more water. She's going to ...
Xidowen is going to ...

Think
Do you think your living habits are healthy? Why or why not?

sections.title: 第 20 页
sections.text:
Listen and chant.
I'm going to stay healthy!

Are you going to stay healthy?
What are you going to do?
I'm going to eat fruit and vegetables
And get enough sleep too.

We're going to look after our bodies.
We're going to cycle in the sun.
We're going to stay healthy together
Because that will make it more fun!

Learn
What are you going to do?
We are/I am going to eat healthy food.
What is he/she going to do?
He/She is going to do more exercise.

Ask and answer.

My health plan
by Xiaowen
• play ping-pong on Monday afternoon
• walk to school
• go to bed before 10 p.m.
• eat more fruit and vegetables

What is Xiaowen going to do to stay healthy?    She's going to .

sections.title: 第 21 页
sections.text:
**Communicate**

**Listen and circle, Then say.**

**Health tips for children**
by Doctor Li

1. Do half an hour/an hour of exercises every day.

2. Don't play on the computer/play with friends all day.

3. Eat fruit and vegetables/meat and noodles every day.

4. Don't eat unhealthy food too often, or you may get ill.

5. Drink six/eight glasses of water every day.

6. Milk/Juice is good for you too.

7. Get 6-8/8-10 hours of sleep a night.

----

**What are some of Doctor Li's health tips?**

Eat ...
Drink ...

----

**Think**
Do you have any health tips? What are they?

sections.title: 第 23 页
sections.text:
CClI
2 Extend

1 Jim and Matt

I'm Jim. Look at me. I'm strong and healthy.
I'm Matt. I like cheese. I like chocolate.

Jim and Matt live in a small hole in the wall. Jim eats healthy food and does some exercise every day. He is strong and healthy. Matt always eats too much. He never does any exercise. He is fat and not healthy.

2 Don't eat too much junk food. You're getting too fat. You should eat healthy food and do some exercise too. Thank you. But I love junk food.

Matt eats more and more. He still does not do any exercise. Jim talks to him. But Matt does not listen.

22

sections.title: 第 24 页
sections.text:
The cat is coming, Wow! Two little mice. I'm hungry.

Don't eat me, please! Help! Help!

One day, Jim and Matt are in the kitchen. A cat comes, Jim runs into the hole in the wall. He is safe there.

Matt runs to the hole too, but he cannot run fast. What happens next?

sections.title: 第 25 页
sections.text:

Luckily, Matt runs into the hole.
